{{Quote|Impossible! Our fire doesn't penetrate their shields! Let's hope your shields are as good, Captain Tekba!|[[Green Leader (Destruction of the Pelagia)|Green Leader]]|<ref name="Empire's End 1" />}}
The '''Destruction of the ''Pelagia''''' was a brief battle between the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] troopship ''[[Pelagia]]'' and a [[Particle disintegrator warhead|missile]], shot from the [[Superweapon/Legends|superweapon]] [[Galaxy Gun]].

==The battle==
Having received word of impending attack by the dreaded cannon, Captain [[Tekba]] ordered a full defense of his ship, as it was incapable of escaping the missile in the ten minute time-span given.

''Pelagia''<nowiki></nowiki>'s complement of [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wings]] and defensive guns bombarded the missile the moment it exited [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]], but it was all for naught. The barrage failed to penetrate the missile's extensive shielding, and it hit the troopship, destroying it and killing all aboard.

Back at [[Byss/Legends|Byss]], Palpatine reveled in yet another victory.

==Behind the scenes==
''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' places the destruction of the ''Pelagia'' on the [[Braxant Run/Legends|Braxant Run]] in grid square N-6,<ref name="TEA" /> in the [[Weneen sector/Legends|Weneen sector]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].<ref name="EAOC" />
